yakuba 0.1.0
  • Reference

Package index

All functions

choose_dyak_dataset()
Switch the default dataset for dyak_* functions
dyak_body_annotations()
Return neurojson body annotations via the Clio interface
dyak_connection_table()
Connectivity query for yakuba neurons
dyak_ids()
Get yakuba ids in standard formats
dyak_islatest()
Check if a bodyid still exists in the specified yakuba DVID node
dyak_neuprint()
Login to yakuba neuprint server
dyak_neuprint_meta()
Fetch neuprint metadata for yakuba neurons
dyak_xyz2bodyid()
Map XYZ locations to bodyids for the yakuba dataset
read_dyak_neurons()
Read neuronal skeletons via neuprint
with_dyak() choose_dyak()
Evaluate an expression after temporarily setting malevnc options
yakuba_annotate_body()
Set Clio body annotations
yakuba_register_xforms()
Register yakuba and MANC TPS transforms

Developed by Gregory Jefferis.
